summary: Generate mode: Tested Scanner V3 features including /api/scanner/stats, /api/tokens/scan, /api/auto-trading/status, and /api/health endpoints. Created 26 backend tests (all pass) and 25 frontend E2E tests (all pass). Found 1 critical bug: /api/opportunities returns 500 error due to missing attribute 'min_token_age_minutes' in BotSettings.

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - AttributeError: 'BotSettings' object has no attribute 'min_token_age_minutes'. Line 3548 in server.py references settings.min_token_age_minutes but the BotSettings model only has min_token_age_seconds.

scanner_v3_features_verified.scanner_stats_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/scanner/stats returns v3 stats with cache info, source status, config
scanner_v3_features_verified.cache_functionality: PASS - 2s TTL cache configured, clear-cache endpoint works
scanner_v3_features_verified.token_deduplication: PASS - tokens_after_dedup field present in stats
scanner_v3_features_verified.health_check: PASS - Returns healthy status with timestamp

endpoints_verified.GET /api/scanner/stats: PASS - Returns scanner_version=v3, stats with cache info, source_status, config
endpoints_verified.GET /api/tokens/scan: PASS - Returns token list (empty when external APIs have no data)
endpoints_verified.GET /api/api-status: PASS - Returns API failover system status

action_items: FIX: /api/opportunities endpoint (line 3548 in server.py) - Change settings.min_token_age_minutes to settings.min_token_age_seconds or add min_token_age_minutes to BotSettings model

success_rate.backend: 96% (74/77 tests - 2 failed due to /api/opportunities bug, 3 skipped due to max trades reached)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (37 tests passed across scanner-v3 and core-flows specs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scanner V3 features are fully tested and working. The /api/scanner/stats endpoint returns proper scanner statistics including cache info, source status, and performance metrics. Auto-trading status endpoint shows high_frequency_mode=true with 1.0s scan interval. One critical bug found: /api/opportunities endpoint returns 500 due to missing 'min_token_age_minutes' attribute in BotSettings - main agent needs to fix this in server.py line 3548.
